name: Chamonix lodging (Jul 28-30)
notes: Independent visitor lodging — 2 nights covering Concert #1 (Martigny, Jul 29).

options.title: Attractive apartment in the center of Chamonix
options.notes: Triplex, 40-45 m². ★4.85 (75 reviews). Hosted by Antoine (Superhost, 8 yrs). Walking distance to shops and SUD bus station. Heads-up from a guest review: spiral staircase to bedrooms, no smoke/CO detectors.

options.title: Sunny Balcony / Mont-Blanc View / City center
options.location: Chamonix Sud, Chamonix-Mont-Blanc, France (facing Mont Blanc and Les Bossons glacier; steps from Aiguille du Midi gondola)
amenities: Steps from Aiguille du Midi gondola
options.notes: 600 sq ft 1BR. ★4.91 (299 reviews). Hosted by Alexandra (Superhost, 10 yrs). Sleeps 5 max: king + queen sofa bed + bunk beds. Caveat: limited hot water — water heater can't accommodate >4 showers in succession.

options.title: Chamonix 136 — Alpine retreat between Les Houches and Chamonix
options.location: 67 Chem. des Granges, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc — between Les Houches and Chamonix; near Taconnaz station for free Mont Blanc Express rail
options.notes: 2BR/1BA between Les Houches and Chamonix. Bedrooms: double on mezzanine + bunk room with pullout single. Fireplace, ski locker, free Mont Blanc Express access from nearby station. Geneva Airport ~1h15. Price includes taxes & fees.

options.title: Argentiere 26 (Appt Bec D1)
options.location: 5 Rte du Tour, Argentière, 74400 Chamonix-Mont-Blanc — Les Frasserands village (~10 km from Chamonix center)
amenities: Close to ski lifts (3 min to La Vormaine)
options.notes: 3BR/2BA condo. Beds: 2 doubles + twin + trundle. Located in Argentière village, not central Chamonix — bus shuttle to slopes. ⚠️ NO WIFI per the listing. Price includes taxes & fees.

options.title: Elegant flat with AC, heart of Nice
options.location: Old Nice (Vieux Nice), France — 5-min walk to Cours Saleya and the beach; near Place Masséna
options.notes: ★4.99 (141 reviews), Top 5% of homes. Hosted by Bertrand (Superhost). Sleeping: queen in BR1, mezzanine with 2 singles (joinable to king) in BR2 — mezzanine ceiling 1.20 m (sleeping height only); plus sofa bed. Heads-up: Old Town can be noisy at night (host provides earplugs).

options.title: Nice 1 — Ocean-view, west Nice
options.location: 7 Av. Louis Cochois, 06000 Nice — west side; 10-min walk to Promenade des Anglais and beaches
options.notes: ⚠️ Site shows no price for Aug 3-6 — likely UNAVAILABLE for these dates. Verify via the URL. Sleeps 4 (2 double beds, BR1 has balcony access). 20-min walk to Vieux Nice, 10-min walk to tramway → 20 min to airport. No pets, no smoking.

options.title: Nice 6 — Beaulieu-sur-Mer (NOT in Nice)
options.location: 2 Imp. du Baous, 06310 Beaulieu-sur-Mer — coastal town ~20 min drive east of Nice city, not in Nice itself
options.notes: ⚠️ UNAVAILABLE for Aug 3-6 per site ('property not available at that time'). ⚠️ Located in BEAULIEU-SUR-MER, ~20-min drive from Nice city — different town despite the URL path. Near Beaulieu harbor, beaches, train terminal. 35 min to Nice airport. No pets, no smoking.

options.title: Villa Barbara
options.location: Arles, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France — 5-min walk from train station; 1 min from the Arles arenas and historic center
options.notes: 95 m² house over 2 floors. Bedrooms: queen + double + queen, plus a single-bed area. Hosted by Claire (only 3 months hosting — new host). ★3.5 from just 2 reviews — limited data. ⚠️ One reviewer flagged bedding quality and general upkeep. ⚠️ Listing notes 'Carbon monoxide alarm: Unavailable' — no CO alarm in the unit. Note: the URL the option was added with embeds dates Jul 31-Aug 7; price above is for the actual reservation window Jul 30-Aug 3.
